About
01

Clinical expertise meets
operational precision

Regil Marie is a QCHP-registered pharmacist with a track record of maintaining 100% regulatory compliance in controlled medication management across Qatar and the Philippines — with zero discrepancies recorded.

Beyond dispensing, she specializes in independent patient consultations, evidence-based OTC recommendations, insurance claim management (Alkoot, QLM, Globemed, Allianz), and healthcare administrative operations.

She also brings experience as a university guest lecturer and academic administrator, having developed course materials for 100+ pharmacy students.

Cover Letter
06

A letter of introduction

"

Doha, Qatar · May 2026

Dear Hiring Manager,

My name is Regil Marie Capunong, and I am a QCHP-registered pharmacist currently based in Doha, Qatar, with over eight years of experience spanning hospital, retail, and clinical pharmacy settings across two countries. I am writing to express my sincere interest in healthcare operations opportunities where I can contribute both my clinical expertise and my passion for delivering exceptional patient care — from anywhere in the world.

Throughout my career, I have had the privilege of working in environments that demanded precision, adaptability, and genuine care. At Care N Cure Pharmacy in Qatar, I maintained a 100% regulatory compliance record in controlled medication management — not because it was required of me, but because I understand that behind every record is a patient whose safety depends on it. I also personally managed consultations for over 100 clients weekly, guiding them through evidence-based treatment options with empathy and clarity.

What sets me apart is that I do not see pharmacy as merely a dispensing role. I have coordinated full pharmacy setups from launch, managed complex insurance claims across multiple providers (Alkoot, QLM, Globemed, Allianz), supervised emergency and high-risk medication inventories during the height of the COVID-19 pandemic, and taught and mentored pharmacy students as a university guest lecturer — all while maintaining the highest standards of documentation and compliance. I thrive at the intersection of clinical knowledge and operational excellence.

I am particularly drawn to remote roles in pharmacovigilance, drug information, medical writing, AI training, and healthcare operations — areas where my background as a licensed pharmacist can add immediate, meaningful value without geographic constraints. I am a highly self-directed professional, comfortable with remote collaboration tools, and committed to continuous growth in line with evolving global healthcare standards.

I am open to employer-sponsored visa transfers and am prepared to bring the same dedication, accuracy, and genuine commitment to patient welfare to your organization — wherever in the world that may be.

Thank you sincerely for taking the time to consider my application. I would welcome the opportunity to speak with you and learn more about how I can contribute to your team.

Warm regards,

Regil Marie Capunong

QCHP Registered Pharmacist · PH5466

rmcapunong@gmail.com · +974 7478 5781 · linkedin.com/in/rmcapunong
